title: RFI BAP-2026-208-RB Replacement Solution for SAP Solution Manager Components
name: RFI BAP-2026-208-RB Replacement Solution for SAP Solution Manager Components
statement_of_work: You are invited to respond with information to assist the Judicial Council in identifying available software solutions, implementation approaches, technical capabilities, and integration options that can support the Judicial Council¿s planned transition away from SAP Solution Manager.
deliverables: Execute scope of work described in the RFI BAP-2026-208-RB Replacement Solution for SAP Solution Manager Components solicitation
Deliver milestones, status reporting, and acceptance documentation
Provide final handoff and post-deployment support per RFP terms
description:
You are invited to respond with information to assist the Judicial Council in identifying available software solutions, implementation approaches, technical capabilities, and integration options that can support the Judicial Council¿s planned transition away from SAP Solution Manager.

Please visit the Courts Bidders/Solicitations web page to view the published Solicitation:
https://www.courts.ca.gov
All inquiries must be directed to Solicitations@jud.ca.gov
